feedItems.description: allocated £114.3m to Adult Social Care (≈£420 per resident)
allocated £23.1m to Environment & Streets (≈£85 per resident)
allocated £76.6m to Children's Social Care (≈£282 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £110 (5.0%) to £2325
